title: AN ACT RECLASSIFYING THE SUB-DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE IN THE THIRD CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF CEBU, PROVINCE OF CEBU INTO A REGULAR ENGINEERING DISTRICT OFFICE TO BE KNOWN AS THE THIRD ENGINEERING DISTRICT OF CEBU AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF

chunks.text:
H. No. 5208 / 97 OG No. 29, 4268 (July 16, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9052, March 30, 2001 ]

AN ACT RECLASSIFYING THE SUB-DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE IN THE THIRD CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF CEBU, PROVINCE OF CEBU INTO A REGULAR ENGINEERING DISTRICT OFFICE TO BE KNOWN AS THE THIRD ENGINEERING DISTRICT OF CEBU AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The present third congressional sub-district engineering office in the Province of Cebu created pursuant to the Department of Public Works Order No. 109-A is hereby reclassified into a regular engineering district office to be known as the Third Engineering District of Cebu.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provisions of this Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provisions of this Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

AQUILINO Q. PIMENTEL, JR.

(Sgd.) FELICIANO BELMONTE

, JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the

House of Representatives

This

Act which is a consolidation in the House of Representative was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 23, 2000 and January 29, 2001, respectively.

(Sgd.)

LUTGARDO B. BARBO

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: Mar. 30, 2001

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
